2605.03039.title: Mixed-Precision Information Bottlenecks for On-Device Trait-State Disentanglement in Bipolar Agitation Detection
2605.03039.paper_summary: Continuous monitoring of bipolar disorder agitation via voice biomarkers requires disentangling stable speaker traits from volatile affective states on resource-constrained edge devices. We introduce MP-IB, the first framework to treat mixed-precision quantization as an information bottleneck for clinical trait-state separation. The core insight is that numerical precision itself controls capacity: an FP16 trait head (1,024 bits) encodes speaker identity, while an INT4 state head (128 bits) captures agitation, yielding 8x information asymmetry without adversarial training. We augment this with Dynamic Precision Scheduling and Multi-Scale Temporal Fusion. On Bridge2AI-Voice (N=833, 4 sessions/participant, strict speaker-independent CV), MP-IB achieves rho = 0.117 (95\% CI: [0.089, 0.145], p=0.003 vs. chance), outperforming 94M-parameter WavLM-Adapter with in-domain SSL continuation (rho = -0.042), beta VAE disentanglement (rho = 0.089), and hand-crafted prosody (rho = 0.031) by 2.8--15.9 points absolute. Zero-shot transfer to CREMA-D achieves AUC=0.817. Identity leakage is suppressed to near-random (EER=0.42, MIA-AUC=0.52). End-to-end latency is 23.4 ms with a 617 KB footprint, enabling real-time monitoring on sub 20 dollar devices.
2605.03039.paper_summary_zh: 持續監測雙相情感障礙的激動狀態透過語音生物標記需要在資源受限的邊緣設備上將穩定的說話者特徵與易變的情感狀態區分開來。<lb/>我們介紹了MP-IB，這是第一個將混合精度量化視為臨床特徵-狀態分離的信息瓶頸的框架。<lb/>核心見解是數值精度本身控制容量：FP16特徵頭（1,024位）編碼說話者身份，而INT4狀態頭（128位）捕捉激動，產生8倍的信息不對稱而無需對抗訓練。<lb/>我們通過動態精度調度和多尺度時間融合來增強這一點。<lb/>在Bridge2AI-Voice（N=833，4次會話/參與者，嚴格的說話者獨立CV）上，MP-IB達到rho = 0.117（95\% CI: [0.089, 0.145]，p=0.003與隨機相比），超越了94M參數的WavLM-Adapter，後者在領域內的SSL延續中表現為（rho = -0.042），beta VAE解耦（rho = 0.089）和手工製作的韻律（rho = 0.031），絕對優勢為2.8--15.9分。<lb/>零樣本轉移到CREMA-D達到AUC=0.817。<lb/>身份洩漏被抑制到接近隨機（EER=0.42，MIA-AUC=0.52）。<lb/>端到端延遲為23.4毫秒，佔用617 KB的存儲空間，使得在20美元以下的設備上實現實時監測成為可能。
2605.03039.author: Joydeep Chandra et.al.
